item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Having just come in from my own smoke break, I'm really, really glad I don't smoke Marlboros. Though I'm sending this article to a friend that smokes 27's… heh heh.

+1 for being creatively gross!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: For such a manly product, it sure made a lot of people here to swear off smoking.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
A strong concept punchily executed - structurally it reminds me of SCP-2582 (which I love), but it's different enough to be distinct.

The tone of the packaging note doesn't really gel with the rest of the skip, but I don't mind that if it's deliberate - it acts as a bit of misdirection as to where this will end up, but has sufficient consistency with the outcome.

All in all, this is a welcome addition.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Aiden, I think you might be smoking your cigarettes incorrectly.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Good grief, the implications. I guess at least it means TWO people won't want to smoke anymore afterward. 11/10, more effective than the patch.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
but cigars are big, wide, and don't normally contain tobacco

… I don't know what you've been smoking, but Cigars are typically nothing but dried tobbaco leaves. The only thing that isn't made from tobacco on them is that little band and maybe a plastic mouthpiece.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Lol, I just thought the mouth thing was funny. The weird feeling in the middle of the morbidity just amused me greatly.

Yeah, I thought cigars were the same thing as cigarettes for the longest time, but cigars are big, wide, and don't normally contain addictive amounts of nicotine, while cigarettes are smaller, more easily accessible, and highly addictive. Cigars are also said to have a smoother and generally more refined taste.

Coming back to it, I think I'm gonna upvote. It has a nice, Series I charm that I enjoy quite a bit and a balance between lolFoundation and the serious Foundation. +1

Edit: Shit. Nicotine, not tobacco. I don't recall what I was smoking either. Fixed my faux pas.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This stands strongly on its own, but it also raises the potential of a fascinating GoI. Somebody making anomalous objects to help some of these radical fringe groups with their missions.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Gurgle it down.

This is a trip from start to finish. Another funky-ass article with a memorable effect that doesn't kill you to death. It's like a breath of smoke-free air! :B

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: There are only a couple things outside of my own articles that have made me stop and go "wtf did I just read." Take my +1.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
"… leading into a spatially anomalous extension of the filter's paper tube."
And that's when I knew that the squick was on its way.
+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: thanks u helped me quit smoking +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
1. not really sure how to describe a mouth from the perspective of somebody licking one without it sounding a little bit sexual

2. i don't actually know a lot about cigarettes so i was unaware there was a difference. i'll fix that right now.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I'll be honest the note at the beginning made me feel a little trepidation but upon reading the full article that's probably the best place for it. +1

e: I think you could probably add a lot to those containment procedures they really feel under-done. Appreciate the 77 link though.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: damn cant believe somebody caught onto that already

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Now your smoking with portals. +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
tongue emerging from the tube and making contact with a "slimy, fleshy hole."

… was this slightly sexual? I can't shake the feeling. I really don't want to smoke now. More so than normal. So, thanks?

When the lovely middle aged ladies are dropping off the packs, they say cigars instead of cigarettes. Is this implicative of more dangerous cigars, them being ignorant of the difference, or a mistake? I want to change it, but I don't know for sure.

Other than that, I liked the article, but not to the point of upvoting. No vote.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
"eight thousand four hundred (8400) tobacco cigarettes, packaged in boxes containing twenty cigarettes each. "

*calculates*

… well, I think that was intentional.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
As if I needed any more reasons not to start smoking.

+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: That last addendum is fucking perfect.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Oh hell, I'm gagging and shivering and just…GAHHHH! I loved this.

ETA: I feel like this could do without the excerpt, it's a little too silly and doesn't seem to contribute to the sheer Wrongness on display here.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: 5:42 PM <@AidenEldritch> it's like Amigara Fault except with more cunnilingus

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
There were multiple times that reading this made me just go "ugh…" thinking about the sensation of going through that.

+1 for making my tongue extremely uncomfortable

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I like this. Nice and simple, punchy yet understated ending.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
my third SCP

credit to coldest28 for reading it multiple times in teamspeak.

attribution:

Box of Marlboro Blend No. 27s. by AnthonyA7, released under public domain
